steps.t: Drûmaudhul lies to the north-west from Talan Gwilith. Raingon has asked you to burn the Orc-banner at Drûmaudhul and defeat the camp's champion. <r…
Raingon is at Talan Gwilith, south-east of Drûmaudhul. You should return to Raingon with the tidings of your victory at Drûmaudhul. <rgb=#FF0000&gt…
